originalTitle: AWS: Inaccurate Estimated Billing Data – $1.7 billion
content: URL already posted: https://health.aws.amazon.com/health/status I've got an estimated bill for $1.7 BILLION over this month. Normal usage is Obvs have created an urgent AWS support ticket. Anyone else seeing something like this? Update: Reddit link: https://www.reddit.com/r/aws/comments/1uyuaw7/help_my_bill_s...
chineseTitle: AWS：预估账单数据不准确 – 17 亿美元
chineseContent: URL 已发布：https://health.aws.amazon.com/health/status 我收到的本月账单估计为 17 亿美元。正常用法是 Obvs 创建了紧急 AWS 支持票证。还有其他人看到这样的事情吗？更新：Reddit 链接：https://www.reddit.com/r/aws/comments/1u​​yuaw7/help_my_bill_s...
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
